sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after to see what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Get segmentation of both
before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

print("BEFORE nodes:")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:2]}...")

print("\nAFTER nodes:")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:2]}...")

# Focus on green block position change
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"\nGreen block BEFORE: boundary={n['boundary']}")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green block AFTER: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
